description.value: You imbue a slashing melee weapon with the ability to deal a gruesome head wound. When the target weapon hits a living creature, in addition to the normal effects of that hit, the wielder can discharge this spell as a free action to open a gash on the targetâs forehead that deals bleed damage equal to half your caster level. At the start of each of the targetâs turns, when it takes bleed damage, it also takes a cumulative â1 penalty on all attack rolls. When that penalty reaches â3, the target also treats all targets as having concealment (20% miss chance). When the penalty reaches â5, the target is blinded. Stopping the bleed damage ends the effects this spell imposes on the bleeding creature. A target that is immune to bleed damage is also immune to all this spellâs effects.
